items.question: How much do I need to invest?
items.answer: Formats start from around £15k for a kiosk and rise to £70k+ for a flagship store. The plans above break down what each level includes.

items.question: Do I need experience in food and drink?
items.answer: No. Most of our partners came from other industries. Full training, onboarding and operational support are included.

items.question: How long does it take to open?
items.answer: Typically 8-14 weeks from signed agreement to opening day, depending on site selection and fit-out.

items.question: What ongoing support do I get?
items.answer: Supply chain, equipment servicing, marketing campaigns, seasonal menu updates and a dedicated area manager.

items.question: Are territories exclusive?
items.answer: Yes - each partner gets a protected trading area so you are never competing with another outlet of ours.
